    local __skf_1a585c = 5
    local __skf_7630e4 = __skf_1a585c
end

M,F in ipairs({{1;1316},{1,327},{328;1316}})do while F[1]<F[2]do z[F[1]],z[F[2]],F[1],F[2]=z[F[2]],z[F[1]],F[1]+1,F[2]-1 end end local function M(M)return z[M-53116]end do local M=string.len local F=z local y=table.concat local i=type local P=math.floor local K=table.insert local b={r=21,c=42,Y=33,["\050"]=49;b=58,k=18,D=52,C=17,["\055"]=13,Q=54,x=48;h=43;s=63;p=32;n=5;J=0;T=62,o=30,["\049"]=19,["\043"]=36,Z=27;O=14,H=28;w=59,q=11,S=4;F=60,V=37;U=1,["\047"]=35,l=45,["\052"]=50,E=34;X=56;t=61,B=6,N=31;a=41;v=16,L=9;z=23,m=15;P=39,G=3;W=55;["\054"]=20,f=40,["\053"]=46,i=7,I=24;["\057"]=2,M=12;A=10;d=47;g=29,j=51,K=8;["\048"]=44;e=53;["\051"]=57,u=26,R=25,["\056"]=22;y=38}local f=string.sub local O=string.char for z=1,#F,1 do local Y=F[z]if i(Y)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local i=M(Y)local s={}local Q=1 local D=0 local H=0 while Q<=i do local z=f(Y,Q,Q)local M=b[z]if M then D=D+M*64^(3-H)H=H+1 if H==4 then H=0 local z=P(D/65536)local M=P((D%65536)/256)local F=D%256 K(s,O(z,M,F))D=0 end elseif z=="\061"then K(s,O(P(D/65536)))if Q>=i or f(Y,Q+1,Q+1)~="\061"then K(s,O(P((D%65536)/256)))end break end Q=Q+1 end F[z]=y(s)end end end return(function(z,y,i,P,K,b,f,S,h,T,C,a,R,B,A,F,U,m,Y,Q,D,Z,O,g,s,E,H)U,H,F,B,h,m,T,A,s,Y,Q,S,O,Z,g,R,D,C,a,E=function(z,M)local y=D(M)local i=function(i,P,K,b)return F(z,{i;P,K,b},M,y)end return i end,function(z)local M,F=1,z[1]while F do Y[F],M=Y[F]-1,1+M if 0==Y[F]then Y[F],O[F]=nil,nil end F=z[M]end
